notes: Receipt gas covers two controlled match txs and five on-chain cancel txs. Off-chain soft cancels had no on-chain gas.

caveats: Score/settle/claim lifecycle deferred because contest 33 was still pre-game during the pre-test window; this remains a separate postgame cleanup obligation for the real tiny positions.

Two initial MM audit-poll PositionWithoutCommitment errors were observed from carry-over contest-33 positions and a fresh local MM state; they did not create persistent divergence, duplicate fill telemetry, or non-zero final exposure.
Reconnect coverage used a separate v0.6.2 watcher through a local drop proxy so the full-soak watcher could remain never-reconnected for the passive-expiry regression row.

Required fill, partial, soft-cancel, expiry/replacement, reconnect, restart/resume, no-duplicate, no-divergence, and zero-drain checks passed.
